name: energy_school_district_s_new_attendance_lumen_rig_utl
premise: A model-driven workflow escalated automatically; humans disagree on whether the escalation itself caused avoidable harm. In Energy, the situation tagged internally around energy school district new attendance lumen rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. The trade is not abstract: it is rights versus utility under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Sana Navarro

agents.name: Jonah Hughes

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect utility.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to utility to secure rights before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Sana Navarro must choose under rights versus utility. What does Sana Navarro do?
